title: Sales Support (CargoWise) [SL]
description:
• Provide dedicated support for CargoWise (CW) sales-related issues, ensuring accuracy and compliance with company processes.
  • Serve as the subject matter expert for sales teams on CW sales module inquiries and proper data setup.
  • Perform data validation and basic analysis on sales entries to identify discrepancies and prevent billing issues.
  • Support operations by troubleshooting sell rating errors.
  • Ensure smooth and accurate implementation of client rates, customer quotations, and one-off quotes in coordination with Customer Service, Operations, and Billing teams to enable successful autorating.
  • Participate in CargoWise implementation and post-implementation activities, including testing and alignment of sales entry workflows.
  • Assist in preparing sales and shipment reports by extracting, validating, and consolidating data from CargoWise (CW) and AS400 systems.
  • Develop, review, and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for Accounts processes across Ocean, Air, and Logistics operations.
  • Collaborate closely with Accounts, Sales, and Operations teams to ensure sales entries are correctly structured for downstream billing and financial reporting.
  • Provide user guidance and basic training on correct CW sales entry practices.

Requirement

  • Possess a Diploma / Degree or equivalent.
  • Preferably 5 years of freight forwarding experience within the Air Freight division.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

EA License No: 20C0270

EA Personnel Name: Law Mei Fong

Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
